nodes.name: Execute Workflow Trigger
nodes.notes: This trigger allows other workflows to call this sub-workflow. Use 'Execute Workflow' node in parent workflows to invoke this.

nodes.name: Get User Profile Data
nodes.notes: Pulls all rows from the 'User Profile' sheet. Each row should have 'field_name' and 'field_value' columns.

nodes.name: Transform to Clean JSON
nodes.notes: Converts sheet rows (field_name, field_value) into a clean JSON object with field names as keys.
